caption: In a large, dimly lit hall with high ceilings and ornate chandeliers, a group of people participate in a martial arts demonstration. Several individuals wear traditional attire, including blue, yellow, and white tunics and trousers. In the initial moments, a group of performers stands distributed across a blue floor mat while a crowd of spectators watches from the background. As the sequence progresses, the performers transition into active movements. Two men, one dressed in yellow and another in blue, wield long wooden staffs, practicing synchronized or opposing strikes. The man in yellow moves dynamically, swinging his staff, while the man in blue maintains a focused stance. Other participants in blue and white clothing stand nearby, some observing and others preparing to move. The lighting remains consistent, casting soft shadows across the room as the performers execute their forms.
